issues.sample: My engine got my brand new Camaro is having a lifter tick issue. This seems to be a very common issue amongst these new Chevy engines, after doing research they all seem to stem from the same problem, and that would be the fuel management system that deactivates certain cylinders

Over a year ago, my car developed an intermittent slow crank/starting issue. After driving 20–30 minutes and turning the engine off, it often wouldn’t restart on the first try, sometimes requiring 2–5 cranks. From my research (forums, Reddit, Facebook), I suspected heat soak affe

narrative.headline: What 2023 Chevrolet Camaro owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 15 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (40% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
